summary: Workflow missing SHA pinning for actions/checkout@v4 (explicit requirement: 'pinned action refs'). PowerShell scripts follow best practices well (Set-StrictMode, error handling, type hints) but CLI argument parsing (lines 119–127 in Invoke-ArtifactCleanup.ps1) is manual and fragile. Test harness hard-codes expected values (Run-ActTests.ps1 lines 52–76), tightly coupling fixtures to test code; adding a case requires modifying both. Workflow itself is sound, permissions are minimal, triggers sensible. Run-ActTests validates structure and runs comprehensive assertions. Would ship after pinning checkout to SHA, but maintainability suffers from embedded test data.
